query:
-- Find all reservations with Wakeboardcenter experiences in the period 2026-03-01 to 2026-04-02
SELECT r.id, r.bookingRef, r.clientName, r.clientEmail, r.experienceId, r.status, r.totalAmount, r.bookingDate, r.createdAt
FROM reservations r
WHERE r.experienceId IN (30001, 30002, 30003, 30004, 30005, 30006, 30007, 30008, 90001)
AND r.status IN ('paid', 'confirmed', 'completed')
ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC;
